basic_details.job_title: Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 125 District-Level Posts Across Multiple States
basic_details.short_information: CSC e-Governance Services India Ltd. has released the CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Operator Recruitment 2026 notification for the post of Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator – District across multiple states including Bihar, Chhattisgarh, Madhya Pradesh, and Maharashtra. These posts are to be filled on a purely contract basis for a period of 1 year. Candidates with an Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor certificate issued by a UIDAI-authorized agency can apply before the last date of 20 August 2026 through the CSC Job Portal.

age_limit.details: The minimum age to apply for the CSC Aadhaar Operator Vacancy 2026 is 18 years . No maximum age or age relaxation details are mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.details: Candidates planning to apply for the CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Operator Bharti 2026 must meet all eligibility conditions set by CSC e-Governance Services India Ltd. The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and no upper age limit is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates must hold a valid Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor certificate from a UIDAI-authorized testing and certifying agency. | Candidates must have one of the following qualifications to be eligible for the CSC Aadhaar Seva Kendra Recruitment 2026: | The minimum age to apply for the CSC Aadhaar Operator Vacancy 2026 is 18 years. No maximum age or age relaxation details are mentioned in the official notification. | Every applicant must possess an Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor certificate issued by a Testing & Certifying Agency authorized by UIDAI for delivering Aadhaar services. Additionally, candidates must have basic computer skills. Candidates who do not yet hold this certificate can appear for the Aadhaar Supervisor exam through the link: https://uidai.dexitglobalexams.com/UIDAI/LoginAction.action | As per the official notification, VLEs (Village Level Entrepreneurs) are not eligible to apply for the Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator – District post under this CSC recruitment drive.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates under the CSC Aadhaar Operator Recruitment 2026 will be paid as per the state government's prescribed wage structure. The remuneration for all selected Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator candidates will be the minimum wages of the respective state set for semi-skilled manpower. The exact figure will vary from state to state based on the applicable minimum wage notification of Bihar, Chhattisgarh, Madhya Pradesh, or Maharashtra.

how_to_apply: The CSC Aadhaar Operator Apply Online 2026 process is conducted entirely through the official CSC Job Portal at career.csccloud.in. Candidates must ensure they have their Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor certificate ready before beginning the application. The last date to apply is 20 August 2026, and no offline applications are accepted under this recruitment.
Visit the official CSC Job Portal at career.csccloud.in.
Navigate to the relevant job post for your state – Bihar, Chhattisgarh, Madhya Pradesh, or Maharashtra.
Click on the "Apply Now" button on the job post page.
Fill in the online application form with your personal, educational, and certification details.
Upload the required documents including your Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor certificate.
Submit the application form before 20 August 2026.

content_sections.heading: CSC Aadhaar Operator Recruitment 2026 – PDF Download Link
content_sections.text: The official job post notifications for the CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Operator Recruitment 2026 are hosted directly on the CSC Job Portal (career.csccloud.in). Candidates can access the state-specific job post pages using the direct links given below. These links contain the complete details of the CSC Aadhaar Operator Vacancy 2026 for each state.

content_sections.heading: CSC Aadhaar Operator Vacancy 2026 – Quick Overview
content_sections.text: The CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Operator Bharti 2026 is a district-level contractual recruitment drive conducted under the Aadhaar Seva Kendra (ASK) programme. The following table gives a quick overview of the key details of this CSC e-Governance Recruitment 2026.

rows.information: State minimum wages for semi-skilled manpower

content_sections.heading: CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Operator Notification 2026 – Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates interested in the CSC Aadhaar Operator Recruitment 2026 must note the critical date listed below. The last date to submit the online application is 20 August 2026 . No other dates such as notification release date or exam date are mentioned in the official source.

content_sections.heading: CSC Aadhaar Seva Kendra Vacancy 2026 – State-wise & District-wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: The CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Vacancy 2026 is spread across four states with vacancies available at the district level. Candidates must check which district they are applying for, as each district has a specific number of openings under the CSC Aadhaar Operator Bharti 2026.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for CSC Aadhaar Operator Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates planning to apply for the CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Operator Bharti 2026 must meet all eligibility conditions set by CSC e-Governance Services India Ltd. The minimum age requirement is 18 years , and no upper age limit is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates must hold a valid Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor certificate from a UIDAI-authorized testing and certifying agency. Candidates must have one of the following qualifications to be eligible for the CSC Aadhaar Seva Kendra Recruitment 2026: The minimum age to apply for the CSC Aadhaar Operator Vacancy 2026 is 18 years . No maximum age or age relaxation details are mentioned in the official notification. Every applicant must possess an Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor certificate issued by a Testing & Certifying Agency authorized by UIDAI for delivering Aadhaar services. Additionally, candidates must have basic computer skills . Candidates who do not yet hold this certificate can appear for the Aadhaar Supervisor exam through the link: https://uidai.dexitglobalexams.com/UIDAI/LoginAction.action As per the official notification, VLEs (Village Level Entrepreneurs) are not eligible to apply for the Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator – District post under this CSC recruitment drive.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Remuneration – CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Operator 2026
content_sections.text: Selected candidates under the CSC Aadhaar Operator Recruitment 2026 will be paid as per the state government's prescribed wage structure. The remuneration for all selected Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator candidates will be the minimum wages of the respective state set for semi-skilled manpower . The exact figure will vary from state to state based on the applicable minimum wage notification of Bihar, Chhattisgarh, Madhya Pradesh, or Maharashtra.

content_sections.heading: How to Obtain the Aadhaar Supervisor Certificate Before Applying
content_sections.text: Candidates who do not yet hold the mandatory Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor certificate need to complete two steps before they are eligible to apply for CSC Aadhaar Seva Kendra jobs. First, they must apply for and pass the Aadhaar Supervisor exam; second, they must complete the LMS certification. Both processes are managed through official UIDAI platforms. Visit the Aadhaar Supervisor exam portal at https://uidai.dexitglobalexams.com/UIDAI/LoginAction.action and submit your exam application. An authorization request will be sent to the State Team. Once approved, you will be permitted to appear for the Aadhaar Supervisor exam. After your LMS ID and Password are created and approved, appear for the Aadhaar LMS Certification through the portal at https://e-learning.uidai.gov.in Once certified, proceed to apply for the CSC Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor district post on the CSC Job Portal.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Operator Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The CSC Aadhaar Operator Apply Online 2026 process is conducted entirely through the official CSC Job Portal at career.csccloud.in. Candidates must ensure they have their Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor certificate ready before beginning the application. The last date to apply is 20 August 2026 , and no offline applications are accepted under this recruitment. Visit the official CSC Job Portal at career.csccloud.in . Navigate to the relevant job post for your state – Bihar, Chhattisgarh, Madhya Pradesh, or Maharashtra. Click on the "Apply Now" button on the job post page. Fill in the online application form with your personal, educational, and certification details. Upload the required documents including your Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor certificate. Submit the application form before 20 August 2026 .

content_sections.heading: CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Operator Apply Online 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates can submit their online applications for the CSC Aadhaar Seva Kendra Recruitment 2026 through the official CSC Job Portal. The apply online facility is available for all four states – Bihar, Chhattisgarh, Madhya Pradesh, and Maharashtra. Ensure your Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor certificate is valid and issued by a UIDAI-authorized agency before clicking Apply Now. The online application window closes on 20 August 2026 .

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid in CSC Aadhaar Operator Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Many candidates make avoidable errors while applying for the CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Operator Vacancy 2026 that can lead to rejection of their application. The points below are based on common patterns seen in similar contractual government recruitment drives and are not derived from the official notification. Applying without a valid UIDAI certificate: The Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor certificate from a UIDAI-authorized agency is a mandatory requirement. Applying without it will result in disqualification. VLEs applying despite ineligibility: VLEs are explicitly barred from applying. Submitting an application as a VLE wastes your time and will be rejected at the verification stage. Applying for the wrong district: Each vacancy is district-specific. Ensure you apply for the correct district as per your location and preference. Incomplete LMS Certification: Candidates sometimes have the Supervisor exam cleared but not the LMS Certification. Both are required before applying. Submitting incorrect documents: Upload clear, legible scans of your educational certificates and Aadhaar Operator certificate. Blurry or mismatched documents can cause rejection. Missing the last date: The portal closes applications on 20 August 2026. Do not wait until the last day — technical issues near the deadline are common. Confusing CSC e-Governance with state government jobs: This is a contractual, not permanent government post. Ensure you understand the terms of engagement before applying.

faq.question: Q1. Has CSC e-Governance Services India Ltd. officially released the Aadhaar Supervisor Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, CSC e-Governance Services India Ltd. has officially released the Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator – District recruitment notification for 2026 for states including Bihar, Chhattisgarh, Madhya Pradesh, and Maharashtra through the CSC Job Portal at career.csccloud.in.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for CSC Aadhaar Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Operator Vacancy 2026 is 20 August 2026. Candidates should apply well before the deadline to avoid last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Operator 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 12th (Intermediate/Senior Secondary), or Matriculation with 2 Years ITI, or Matriculation with 3 Years Polytechnic Diploma. A valid Aadhaar Operator/Supervisor certificate from a UIDAI-authorized agency is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum age to apply for CSC Aadhaar Seva Kendra Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age required to apply is 18 years. No maximum age limit is specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for selected candidates in CSC Aadhaar Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive the minimum wages of the respective state as applicable to semi-skilled manpower. The exact amount differs for Bihar, Chhattisgarh, Madhya Pradesh, and Maharashtra based on their current state minimum wage rates.

faq.question: Q6. Are VLEs eligible to apply for the CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Operator post?
faq.answer: No. The official notification clearly states that VLEs (Village Level Entrepreneurs) are not eligible to apply for the Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator – District post under this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. How can I get the Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator certificate required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can appear for the Aadhaar Supervisor exam through the portal at uidai.dexitglobalexams.com after getting state team approval. Additionally, LMS Certification can be completed through e-learning.uidai.gov.in once an LMS ID and Password are issued.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job or a contractual post?
faq.answer: This is a purely contractual post for a period of 1 year only. It is not a permanent government job. The position is under CSC e-Governance Services India Ltd. for Aadhaar Seva Kendra (ASK) operations.

faq.question: Q9. How many total vacancies are available across all states in CSC Aadhaar Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Bihar has the highest number of vacancies spread across 37 districts. Chhattisgarh has 18 vacancies across 6 districts, Madhya Pradesh has 5 vacancies across 5 districts, and Maharashtra has 1 vacancy in Yavatmal district. The vacancies are district-specific and candidates must apply for their respective district.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I apply online for CSC Aadhaar Supervisor Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official CSC Job Portal. State-specific direct links are: Bihar – career.csccloud.in/job-post/MTMzNA==, Chhattisgarh – career.csccloud.in/job-post/MTMyMg==, Madhya Pradesh – career.csccloud.in/job-post/MTMyMQ==, Maharashtra – career.csccloud.in/job-post/MTMyMA==.

faq.answer: Yes, CSC e-Governance Services India Ltd. has officially released the Aadhaar Supervisor/Operator – District recruitment notification for 2026 for states including Bihar, Chhattisgarh, Madhya Pradesh, and Maharashtra through the CSC Job Portal at career.csccloud.in.
